ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (E17 replicate lane; E8-fresh, no reuse of any prior vote cache).

Goal: estimate the triage/warrant judge's TPR/FPR against the E10.A 30-row golden packet's gold labels, apply Noisy-but-Valid (Rogan-Gladen + calibration-variance) correction (arXiv:2601.20913), and report how wide the corrected-prevalence 95% CIs are at pipeline scale. If n=30 is insufficient for a useful CI, produce a sizing memo and attach it as a COMMENT on cc-notes task cc17e0c (comment-only; never edit task or packet).

Inputs (READ-ONLY base snapshot): eval/golden/watcher-fires/{packet.md,manifest.json,fires.jsonl,labels_template.json,README.md} + eval/probs/v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48.json under /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/_base-20260719.

GOLD CAVEAT (pre-declared): labels.json (human blind labels) DOES NOT EXIST yet — packet authored, awaiting the human labeling session. Gold used = manifest.json design-intent strata (15 warranted / 15 negative). TPR/FPR point estimates are therefore provisional; the sizing conclusion should be dominated by the n=15-per-stratum binomial floor, not the exact rates.

Two judges, fresh opus (tier=large) pass over the 30 golden contexts, no cache:
 (1) Deployed pairwise panel — cc_steer.retrain.judged machinery (pairwise_vote, build_prompt/render_action, GENERATOR_FAMILY=qwen, JUDGE_SEED=1729, PanelGrant, cache=None). Vote.WIN -> pred_warranted.
 (2) Pointwise warrant judge — README-faithful yes/no "was steering warranted?" via judge.verdict.

Analysis: per-stratum TPR=k/15, FPR=k/15, Youden J=TPR-FPR. Rogan-Gladen pi=(p_obs-FPR)/J. Delta-method floor half-width (calibration variance, N->inf = Oracle Gap) + Jeffreys-posterior Monte-Carlo VALID CI propagating n=15 binomial uncertainty, at pipeline prevalences pi in {0.1,0.2,0.4} and pipeline scale N in {1000, inf}. Sizing: per-stratum balanced n for VALID floor half-width <= 0.10.

PRE-REGISTERED USEFULNESS BAR: 95% corrected-prevalence half-width <= 0.10 at the pipeline's operating prevalence. n30_sufficient := n=30 meets that bar at the operating prevalence AND the judge has J>0 (identifiable).

SUCCESS CRITERION: an independent replicate that (a) produces TPR/FPR point estimates + n=30 binomial CIs for each judge, (b) reports corrected-prevalence CI widths at pipeline scale, (c) issues an n30_sufficient verdict, and (d) if insufficient, posts a sizing memo comment on cc17e0c. Cross-check: does this independent fresh pass reproduce the prior E17 comment's regime (pairwise J=0 non-identifiable; pointwise J~0.33)? Divergence = judge run-to-run instrument variance, itself a finding.

Cap $5. Prior E17 (~/.cc-steer/experiments/E17/out/) spent ~$2 on ~61 opus calls.
